mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.sender_id AS senderId, m.receiver_id AS receiverId, m.content, m.message_type AS messageType, m.image_url AS imageUrl, m.status, m.client_msg_id AS clientMsgId, m.create_time AS createTime FROM biz_private_message m LEFT JOIN biz_private_conversation c ON c.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND c.peer_id = #{peerId} WHERE ( (m.sender_id = #{currentUserId} AND m.receiver_id = #{peerId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0) OR (m.sender_id = #{peerId} AND m.receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0) ) AND (#{lastMessageId} IS NULL OR m.id < #{lastMessageId}) AND ( c.clear_before_time IS NULL OR m.create_time >= c.clear_before_time ) ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize}

SELECT t.peer_id AS peerId, u.nickname AS peerNickname, u.avatar AS peerAvatar, t.last_message AS lastMessage, t.last_message_type AS lastMessageType, t.last_image_url AS lastImageUrl, t.last_message_time AS lastMessageTime, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{currentUserId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END AS peer_id, m.content AS last_message, m.message_type AS last_message_type, m.image_url AS last_image_url, m.create_time AS last_message_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{currentUserId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END ORDER BY m.id DESC ) AS rn FROM biz_private_message m LEFT JOIN biz_private_conversation c ON c.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND c.peer_id = CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{currentUserId} THEN m.receiver_id ELSE m.sender_id END WHERE ( (m.sender_id = #{currentUserId} AND m.sender_deleted = 0) OR (m.receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND m.receiver_deleted = 0) ) AND ( c.clear_before_time IS NULL OR m.create_time >= c.clear_before_time )) t INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.peer_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT sender_id AS peer_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM biz_private_message WHERE receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND status = 0 AND receiver_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sender_id) unread ON unread.peer_id = t.peer_id WHERE t.rn = 1 ORDER BY t.last_message_time DESC
